[[Agent/Legends|Agent]] '''Inglemenn Barezz''' was a member of the [[Senate Bureau of Intelligence/Legends|Senate Bureau of Intelligence]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Following the [[Battle of Duro (Clone Wars)|Battle of Duro]], he wrote a report implicating several [[Senator/Legends|senators]] in that [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] fall to the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].
